cues.text: 第十八課：我是坐車來的
小明，你怎麼來的？我還以為你今天不來了呢！
cues.tr: Xiao Ming, how did you get here? I thought you weren’t coming today!
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 我也是剛到，路上堵車了。不過我終於到了！今天有點不一樣，我是坐車來的，一般我是坐地鐵來的。對了，這個送你。
cues.tr: I just arrived too. There was a traffic jam on the way, but I finally made it! Today is a bit different—I came by car. Usually, I take the subway. By the way, this is for you.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 原來如此！沒關係的，人來就好了，怎麼還讓你破費了呢？
cues.tr: I see! That’s alright, as long as you’re here. But you didn’t have to spend money on this!
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 這沒什麼，禮輕情意重，一點小意思，希望你會喜歡。
cues.tr: It’s nothing. It’s the thought that counts. Just a little something—I hope you like it.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 謝謝你，小明！你太客氣了。我開來看看，哦！這是我最喜歡的書！
cues.tr: Thank you, Xiao Ming! You’re so thoughtful. Let me take a look. Oh! This is my favorite book!
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 我知道你喜歡書，所以特意買了這本給你。我在書店裡發現它時，就想到你會喜歡。
cues.tr: I know you love books, so I specifically bought this one for you. When I saw it in the bookstore, I immediately thought you’d like it.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 你真的很有心！今天的聚會我們還會遇到好多新朋友呢。
cues.tr: You’re really so considerate! We’ll be meeting a lot of new friends at today’s gathering.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 是啊，過去我只聽說過他們，這次終於要見到了！你是怎麼認識他們的？
cues.tr: Yes, I’ve only heard about them before, and now I finally get to meet them! How did you get to know them?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 有一次在學校的活動上遇到的，然後我們聊著聊著就成了朋友。對了，我還準備了一些點心給大家。
cues.tr: I met them once at a school event, and after chatting for a while, we became friends. By the way, I’ve also prepared some snacks for everyone.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 太好了！需要我幫忙把點心擺在桌上嗎？
cues.tr: That’s great! Do you need help setting up the snacks on the table?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 好啊，麻煩你把飲料放到桌子那邊，我把水果放在這裡。
cues.tr: Sure, could you place the drinks on that table over there? I’ll put the fruits over here.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 一邊準備，一邊聊天，時間過得真快！
cues.tr: Preparing and chatting at the same time—time flies so fast!
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 今天真是充實的一天，見到朋友，收到禮物，還一起吃點心！
cues.tr: Today is such a fulfilling day—meeting friends, receiving gifts, and sharing snacks!
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 希望我們以後也能經常見面！
cues.tr: I hope we can meet more often in the future!
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 當然！以後我會常常過來找你，這樣我們可以一邊喝茶，一邊聊天。
cues.tr: Of course! I’ll visit you frequently so we can drink tea and chat together.
cues.speaker: B

cues.tr: Sounds great! I’m looking forward to it!
cues.speaker: A
